name: Yum-Yum Gems
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the sour milk, stirring well to combine.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves) and chopped nuts and raisins, mixing until just combined.
4. Pour the batter into greased cupcake tins, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the gems to cool in the tins for a few minutes before removing and serving with any desired icing.
